label: Apparel properties
description: Properties for wearable items covering body coverage, layers, outfit tags, graphic paths, ideology desire, and rendering.

bodyPartGroups.label: Body part groups
bodyPartGroups.description: BodyPartGroupDef references for the body regions this apparel covers.

layers.label: Layers
layers.description: ApparelLayerDef references for the clothing layers this item occupies.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: String tags used by apparel requirement precepts and pawn generation rules.

defaultOutfitTags.label: Default outfit tags
defaultOutfitTags.description: Outfit policy tags controlling which auto-assigned outfits include this item.

countsAsClothingForNudity.label: Counts as clothing for nudity
countsAsClothingForNudity.description: Whether wearing this item prevents the 'unclothed' nudity condition for mood purposes.

developmentalStageFilter.label: Developmental stage filter
developmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) limiting which life stages can wear this item.

wornGraphicPath.label: Worn graphic path
wornGraphicPath.description: Texture path prefix for the on-body graphic shown when this item is worn.

hatRenderedFrontOfFace.label: Hat rendered front of face
hatRenderedFrontOfFace.description: If true, this hat is drawn in front of the face when the pawn faces the camera.

hatRenderedAboveBody.label: Hat rendered above body
hatRenderedAboveBody.description: If true, this hat is drawn above the body layer instead of the head layer.

shellRenderedBehindHead.label: Shell rendered behind head
shellRenderedBehindHead.description: If true, shell-layer items (e.g. dusters) are drawn behind the pawn's head.

canBeGeneratedToSatisfyWarmth.label: Can be generated to satisfy warmth
canBeGeneratedToSatisfyWarmth.description: Whether random pawn generation can pick this item to meet a warmth threshold.

canBeDesiredByAnyFaction.label: Can be desired by any faction
canBeDesiredByAnyFaction.description: If true, all factions may include this item in style-desire lists.

canBeDesiredForIdeo.label: Can be desired for ideo
canBeDesiredForIdeo.description: Whether ideoligion precepts can require pawns to wear this item.

scoreOffset.label: Score offset
scoreOffset.description: Flat bonus added to this item's selection score in apparel generation.

renderSkipFlags.label: Render skip flags
renderSkipFlags.description: RenderSkipFlagDef references for render nodes that should be hidden while this apparel is worn.

useWornGraphicMask.label: Use worn graphic mask
useWornGraphicMask.description: If true, a mask texture is applied to the worn graphic to blend with the pawn's skin color.

coversFace.label: Covers face
coversFace.description: If true, the pawn's face is hidden while wearing this item.

wearForced.label: Wear forced
wearForced.description: If true, pawns in the appropriate role are forced to wear this item and cannot remove it.

ungeneratable.label: Ungeneratable
ungeneratable.description: If true, random pawn generation never assigns this item.

characterCreationEnabled.label: Character creation enabled
characterCreationEnabled.description: Whether this item appears in the pawn starting gear character creation screen.
